GameConditionDef.label: Drought
GameConditionDef.description:
An extreme drought has set over the area. Rain clouds have vanished, and the sun is baking the earth.

Outdoor crops and wild plants will suffer heavily from the lack of moisture, almost halting their growth and eventually dying off. The fires will spread much quicker.

Plants sown in hydroponics systems are not affected.
GameConditionDef.letterText:
An extreme drought has set over the area. Rain clouds have vanished, and the sun is baking the earth.

Outdoor crops and wild plants will suffer heavily from the lack of moisture, almost halting their growth and eventually dying off. The fires will spread much quicker.

Plants sown in hydroponics systems are not affected.

GameConditionDef.label: orbital ship crash
GameConditionDef.description: A massive orbital ship has suffered a catastrophic structural failure in orbit directly above your region!
GameConditionDef.endMessage: The orbital ship crash is ending.

GameConditionDef.label: psychic stimulation
GameConditionDef.description: Some distant engine of joy sent psychic vibrations that washed over the region, specifically resonating with the minds of a particular demographic.
GameConditionDef.letterText: Every {0} colonist seems more joyful!\n\nSome distant engine of joy sent psychic vibrations that washed over the region, specifically resonating with the minds of a particular demographic. Your colonists feel a deep, soothing calm as their minds are stimulated by the ethereal energy. They are finding great relaxation in this mental state. For a few days, their recreation will be completely satisfied.
